name: Easy Choconut Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 3/8 oz (50g) Instant Coconut Cream Pudding Mix
3 cups Chilled Heavy Whipping Cream, divided
recipeInstructions:
------------
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease and flour two 8-inch cake pans.
2. Prepare the lemon cake mix according to package directions. Cool cakes in pans for 10 minutes, then invert onto cooling racks. Cool completely.
3. In a food processor fitted with the metal blade, process the instant coconut cream pudding mix and milk for 30 seconds. Place in refrigerator until ready to use.
4. Using an electric mixer, beat one cup of heavy whipping cream until soft peaks form. Add 1/4 cup powdered sugar and beat until stiff. Fold in the thickened pudding mixture.
5. Cut each cooled cake horizontally into four layers using a long serrated knife. Place one layer on a cake plate and spread about one-third of the pudding mixture on top, leaving a 1-inch border around the edge without any filling. Sprinkle with approximately one-third of the chopped nuts and press lightly into the filling.
6. Place the second layer on top and repeat the process using half of the remaining ingredients. Repeat with the third layer, using the remaining filling and nuts.
7. Place the fourth layer on top.
8. In a large bowl, beat two cups of heavy whipping cream until soft peaks form. Add 1/2 cup powdered sugar and beat until stiff. Spread over the top and sides of the cake. Lightly press shredded coconut onto the sides and top of the cake.
